title: APS Vehicles
description: APS Vehicles adds 3 new Immersive Vehicles.
body:
APS Vehicles adds 3 new Immersive Vehicles. 

Gurren Digger: Drill to the heavens! An upgraded Tunnel Digger with 2x the inventory spots and 3 upgrade slots. 

Frozen Explorer: An Icy Submarine with 4 upgrade slots

Coral Explorer: An Overgrown Submarine with 1 upgrade slot

All upgrades work with all Immersive Machines.
-APSium Drill: +200% Drill Speed
-APSium Engine: +100% Engine Power, +200% Fuel Requirement
-APSium Plating: +300% Durability
-Rocket Thrusters: +100% Vertical Speed
-Klink Gears: -50% Fuel Requirement


This mod and orignal models were made by Luke100000! Be sure to check out his Immersive Series for more awesome vehicles.
